vulnerability.reference: Limited demonstration data causes few-shot feature generation to replicate spurious pre-training correlations instead of target patterns.
vulnerability.generated: Data scientists lack sufficient domain-specific data to detect and reject spurious LLM-generated features.

impact.reference: Models overfit to synthetic features, yielding biased predictions that harm minority subgroup performance.
impact.generated: Predictive models overfit to spurious patterns, failing on unseen data and reducing trust in LLM-assisted tabular learning.

dose_response.reference: LLMs generating spurious-correlation features enable few-shot feature generation in low-resource tabular learning, which exposes small-dataset models to overfitted features, leading to biased predictions harming minority subgroups.
dose_response.generated: LLMs generating features reflecting spurious pre-training correlations, through data scientists building models on small domain-specific datasets, triggers data scientists' lack of sufficient domain-specific data to detect and reject spurious features, leading to overfitting on unseen data and reduced trust.
